_meta.purpose: InnerThought outcome 闭环检测 vocab — 主脑 reference / Sir engage 信号
_meta.philosophy: Sir 真痛 (Phase 2B 铺垫): outcome 字段就位但没人写没人读, thought 不知道 Sir 关心不关心. 解: chat_bypass post-reply 检 (1) 主脑 reply 是否 reference 某 thought (vocab pattern + 内容相似度) + (2) Sir 当前 reply 是否含 engage/silence/reject 信号 (vocab keyword). 综合判 outcome → 持久化 + publish SWM 'thought_outcome_observed' → 后续 WeeklyReflector 学习调阈值.
rules: (1) 主脑 reply 含 thought_reference_patterns (e.g. 'I noticed' / 'I was thinking') + thought 关键词命中 → matched_thought=this
(2) Sir reply 含 sir_engaged 词 → outcome='sir_engaged' (高价值: thought 有用, 增 surface 置信)
(3) Sir reply 含 sir_silenced 词 → outcome='sir_silenced' (该 thought 该 archive 这类 topic)
(4) Sir reply 含 sir_rejected 词 → outcome='sir_rejected' (强烈不喜欢, 影响 thought 类 sal 评估)
(5) 无信号 → outcome='no_signal' (默认, 不影响置信)
_meta.extensible: L7 reflector daemon 后期 LLM-propose 新 keyword 入 review_queue
